title: Chair with a head and neck rest
abstract: A chair with a cavity for resting the sitter's head and neck in the backrest (well), extending from the vertebra prominens to the top of the neck which fits the head and neck of the user. This cavity is attached to the upper backrest in a groove, which allows vertical adjustment, so that the head and neck of users of different heights can be supported and functioning like a movable pillow in the upper backrest.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A chair characterized by a built-in cavity in the backrest, for supporting the sitterâs head and neck, extending from the vertebra prominens to the top of the neck which fits the head and neck of the user, with little or no gap between the nape and the backrest. The cavity has two parts, a head support and neck support, in which both parts are connected. Neck support is provided by a curved gutter extending longitudinally along the cervical spine from the first vertebra to the last vertebra of the cervical spine, shaped like a , half-round gutter for supporting the nape, with a width sufficient to fit the neck, and head support is provided by a cavity shaped like a gutter widening from the end of the atlas to the occiput for supporting the nape. 2. A chair according to claim 1, wherein the cavity supporting the head and neck is a part of the chair, connected to the upper backrest in a groove, which allows vertical adjustment, such that the head and neck of the users of different heights can be supported like a movable pillow in the upper backrest. 3. The portable pillow has the cavity supporting the head and neck according to claim 2, characterized in that when needed, optionally, the user can remove the pillow completely, using it independently of the chair.
